title: dendrocnide luzonensis var. luzonensis
intro: Dendrocnide luzonensis var. luzonensis, a species of plant in the nettle family, is a highly toxic plant native to the Philippines. The plant contains urushiol, a potent allergen that causes severe skin irritation and pain, and has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Dendrocnide luzonensis var. luzonensis include pain relief and reducing inflammation, which can provide health benefits such as alleviating arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in small amounts to create topical creams and ointments that are said to offer relief from pain and inflammation.
